trivia_bullets.text: First-print Horror creature unique to Core Set 2021 (July 3, 2020), with no subsequent reprints. Fills black's non-vampire undead/ghoul creature suite in M21 Limited alongside other horror-type commons.
"Even the rats refuse to set foot inside. I fear to think what might be waiting in there." — Gravedigger's journal. Unnamed narrator, no named plane or lore character identified in Scryfall data.

ETB loot variant: sacrifice a creature or discard a creature card to draw a card. 3/4 body for 4 mana solid for Limited. EDHREC rank 23,357 — very low Commander inclusion. Pauper-legal; niche in sacrifice-draw loops at common.

Artist Svetlin Velinov is a Bulgarian illustrator (born 1979) on Wizards of the Coast's main illustration team since 2010, with 353+ MTG card credits. One of the most prolific artists in MTG history. His Abrupt Decay art was cited by Hipsters of the Coast as having 'a near perfect color and composition fit' for the classic card frame.
sources: hipstersofthecoast.com: Ain't That a Frame, March 2021

related_cards.name: Carrion Feeder
related_cards.note: one-mana black zombie that self-sacs; exemplifies the sacrifice-synergy shell Crypt Lurker slots into

related_cards.name: Phyrexian Rager
related_cards.note: earlier black common with ETB draw at similar mana cost; direct design lineage comparison

related_cards.name: Village Rites
related_cards.note: one-mana black instant sacrificing a creature to draw two cards; plays in same functional space
